code: import React,{useState,useEffect}from"react";import{useNavigate}from"react-router-dom";import{getTasks,createTask,deleteTask}from"../services/TaskService";import TaskForm from"../components/TaskForm";import TaskList from"../components/TaskList";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const HomePage=()=>{const[user,setUser]=useState(null);const[tasks,setTasks]=useState([]);const[categories,setCategories]=useState([{id:1,title:"General"}]);const navigate=useNavigate();useEffect(()=>{const savedUser=localStorage.getItem("loggedUser");if(savedUser){const parsedUser=JSON.parse(savedUser);setUser(parsedUser);fetchUserTasks(parsedUser.id);}else{navigate("/login");}},[navigate]);const fetchUserTasks=async userId=>{try{const data=await getTasks(userId);setTasks(data);}catch(err){console.error("Error al cargar tareas:",err);}};const handleCreateTask=async taskData=>{try{const newTask=await createTask(taskData,user.id);setTasks([...tasks,newTask]);}catch(err){alert("Error al crear la tarea");}};const handleDeleteTask=async taskId=>{try{await deleteTask(taskId);setTasks(tasks.filter(t=>t.id!==taskId));}catch(err){alert("Error al borrar la tarea");}};if(!user)return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:"Cargando..."});return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{padding:"20px"},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("header",{style:{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h1",{children:["Mis Tareas - ",user.username]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>{localStorage.removeItem("loggedUser");navigate("/login");},children:"Cerrar Sesi\xF3n"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("hr",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TaskForm,{onTaskCreated:handleCreateTask,categories:categories}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Tu Lista"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TaskList,{tasks:tasks,onDelete:handleDeleteTask})]});};export default HomePage;
